title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Gera Developments - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Gera Developments - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Gera Developments, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Sales Manager for our Pimpri-Chinchwad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Gera Developments:
Gera Developments is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Gera Developments!
